name: splash-screen
description: Custom boot splash screen installer - upload any image, auto-formatted to 800x480 PNG via the desktop app
author: dspl1236
scripts: splash_install.sh - Install custom boot screen from SD card
splash_restore.sh - Restore factory splash screens from backup
notes: Use the MMI3G-Toolkit desktop app to upload any image and auto-format it to the correct resolution. The installer backs up existing splash screens to SD card before overwriting.
